---
---

## Slide 1 - Single pipe table

| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |
| 3 | 4 |

## Slide 2 - Multiple pipe tables

| X | Y |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |

::: {.absolute left=204px top=269px}
| P | Q |
|---|---|
| 9 | 8 |
:::

## Slide 3 - Pipe table alongside paragraph

A paragraph next to a table.

::: {.absolute left=143px top=352px}
| Name | Value |
|------|-------|
| foo  | 1     |
| bar  | 2     |
:::

## Slide 4 - Grid table

::: {.absolute left=598px top=218px}
+---+---+
| A | B |
+===+===+
| 1 | 2 |
+---+---+
:::

## Slide 5 - HTML table

::: {.absolute left=240px top=184px}
<table>
<tr><th>A</th><th>B</th></tr>
<tr><td>1</td><td>2</td></tr>
</table>
:::

## Slide 6 - Captioned table

::: {.absolute left=-138px top=228px}
| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |

: My caption {#tbl-cap}
:::

## Slide 7 - List table

::: {.absolute left=158px top=349px}
::: {.list-table}
  - - A
    - B
  - - 1
    - 2
:::
:::

## Slide 8 - Bare grid table

::: {.absolute left=631px top=279px}
+---+---+
| A | B |
+===+===+
| 1 | 2 |
+---+---+
:::

## Slide 9 - Bare HTML table

::: {.absolute left=215px top=358px}
<table>
<tr><th>A</th><th>B</th></tr>
<tr><td>1</td><td>2</td></tr>
</table>
:::

## Slide 10 - Bare captioned pipe table

::: {.absolute left=-217px top=369px}
| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |

: My caption {#tbl-cap2}
:::
